idea-plugin.name: Makinda Themes
idea-plugin.description:
Premium light and dark themes for JetBrains IDEs with warm orange accents and excellent readability.

Ships Makinda Light and Makinda Dark, both generated from the same source-of-truth palette used by the VS Code, Sublime, Zed, and terminal ports of the Makinda theme family.

Works in IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, RustRover, Rider, PhpStorm, RubyMine, and Android Studio.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release: Makinda Light and Makinda Dark.
